sources.title: Human Identities across Nations of the Earth, Ngram Investigator (HINENI)
sources.description: Track the prevalence of identity terms in social media biographies between 2012 and 2023, for over thirty different countries.

sources.title: Ipseology Central
sources.description: A broad collection of resources and data about the study of human identity (Ipseology), maintained by Prof. Jason Jones of Stony Brook University.

sources.title: Identity Keyword Analysis Dashboard
sources.description: Monitor the well-being implication of identity terms in social media biographies
